_note: Baseline of intentionally-published npm versions. The npm-version-watch weekly cron compares live registry state against this file and opens a tamper-alert issue on any drift. When a new version is intentionally published via one of the publish*.yml workflows, update the matching entry via PR as part of the ship-sequence before the tag-push.
_null_note: A null baseline entry declares a package tracked by npm-version-watch that has not yet been published. After the first intentional publish (e.g. @aegis-scan/skills first published as 0.1.1, after skills-v0.1.0 was withheld at the publish-skills.yml tarball-scrub gate) the maintainer updates this entry to the new version via the same baseline-PR workflow used for every other tracked package.
